<compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-testing-import/input.js:1:27: SLOPPYC_E_UNSUPPORTED_TESTING_IMPORT: Sloppy testing helpers cannot be imported by compiled app source
  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-testing-import/input.js:1:27
   |
1 | import { Sloppy, Results, Testing } from "sloppy";
   |                           ^^^^^^^
hint: Use Sloppy testing helpers from JavaScript tests around the generated app, not inside compiler input.
